era: Hip-Hop. E=6 -- solo emergence from collective roots. THEESatisfaction (146) to Stas THEE Boss (173). Central District. Sub Pop. Thirteenth consecutive E=6 (161-173). v1.49.313.

location.formative: Central District -- historically Black neighborhood. THEESatisfaction duo origin. Sub Pop connection. Gentrification pressure. Solo emergence.
location.career: Stas THEE Boss. Stasia Irons. Solo hip-hop. Sub Pop Records. 2016-present.

members.name: Stasia Irons (Stas THEE Boss)
members.note: Formerly one half of THEESatisfaction (degree 146). Solo emergence. Central District. Sub Pop. Direct hip-hop delivery.

associated_musicians.name: Catherine Harris-White
associated_musicians.note: Other half of THEESatisfaction (degree 146). Also pursuing solo work as SassyBlack.

theory_nodes.concept: Solo emergence as E=6 -- duo becomes solo. Creative force concentrates. THEESatisfaction (146) to Stas THEE Boss (173). Concentration as amplification. Direct bars over atmospheric layering.
examples: Atmospheric layering gives way to direct bars.
One voice where there were two. Concentration.
theory_nodes.description: Solo emergence from duo. E=6 through concentration.

genealogy.relationship: Stas THEE Boss at 173. Solo emergence as force.

theory_nodes.concept: Sub Pop hip-hop triangle -- THEESatisfaction (146) + Shabazz Palaces (157) + Stas THEE Boss (173). Three Central District acts. One label. Three modes of experimental hip-hop.
examples: Shabazz Palaces (157): duo, Afrofuturist experimental hip-hop.
Stas THEE Boss (173): solo, direct hip-hop. Evolution.
All Central District. All Sub Pop. Three modes.
theory_nodes.description: Sub Pop hip-hop triangle. Three acts, one label, one neighborhood.

genealogy.relationship: Stas THEE Boss at 173. Third point of the triangle.

theory_nodes.concept: Post-era hip-hop continuation (169-173) -- five degrees after the formal era boundary. Genre eras as gradients deeply confirmed.
theory_nodes.description: Post-era hip-hop. Five degrees after formal boundary. Gradients deeply confirmed.

genealogy.relationship: Stas THEE Boss at 173. Fifth post-era degree.

cross_references.relationship: DUO ORIGIN! Stas THEE Boss = Stasia Irons from THEESatisfaction. Duo (146) to solo (173). The 'THEE' lineage preserved.
SUB POP TRIANGLE! Both Central District. Both Sub Pop. Both experimental hip-hop. Third point of the Sub Pop hip-hop triangle (146/157/173).
SOLO ARC! Both solo from duos. Butler: Digable Planets to Shabazz Palaces to solo. Irons: THEESatisfaction to solo. Same pattern, different arc.
IDENTITY AS FORCE! Both queer Black women in Seattle hip-hop. Both E=6. Identity as force (168) to solo emergence (173).
